tracks.title: Threshold
tracks.notes: Discovered via grid search (360 candidates). Seed 26 found in session 15, +1.23 over seed 3.

tracks.title: The Infinite Series
tracks.notes: Per Norgard's 1959 self-similar sequence. Seed=1 is the purest form.

tracks.title: Golden Spiral
tracks.notes: Derived from phi. D_major seed 80 found in session 17, +0.65 over seed 9.

tracks.title: Harmonic Series
tracks.notes: Second-highest score on the album. Physical basis of consonance.

tracks.title: Logistic Map (r=3.7)
tracks.notes: Edge-of-chaos dynamics. C#_minor seed 18 found in session 15, +1.44 over D_major seed 3.

tracks.title: Mandelbrot Boundary
tracks.notes: Walk along the boundary of the Mandelbrot set. SIGNATURE TRACK â€” receives Goosebump Engine in Week 2.

tracks.title: Rossler's Strange Attractor
tracks.notes: Otto Rossler 1976 chaotic system. Seed 77 found in session 17, +0.60 over seed 10 (searched 120 seeds x 7 keys).

tracks.title: Cantor's Dust
tracks.notes: Fractal silence: middle-third removal creates characteristically sparse rhythms. Seed 10 found via grid search (600 candidates), +1.11 over seed 3.

tracks.title: Zipf's Law
tracks.notes: Rank-frequency distribution found in natural language and music. Seed 26 Bb_minor found via grid search (300 candidates), +1.13 over seed 8 F#_minor.

tracks.title: Thue-Morse Resolution
tracks.notes: Anti-repetitive binary sequence (Thue 1906). Highest-scoring track on the album (93.41). Seed 71 found in session 17, +0.95 over seed 11.

notes: 10-track album. Session 15: 90.70 -> 91.22. Session 17: rossler +0.60, golden_spiral +0.65, thue_morse +0.95, average 91.44.
